# Geoff Chan

> AI product engineer and ex-founder. Head of Product & AI at Raven, building agentic systems end to end including the harness, the knowledge layer agents reason over, and the decision and action layers on top. Previously founded Stack Five (a boutique product agency, bootstrapped to ~$1M in revenue) and led a 16-person engineering team at Code4rena.

## About

- [Homepage](https://geoffreychan.com/): Short bio, current work at Raven, professional history, links.
- [Resume](https://geoffreychan.com/resume/): Detailed career timeline.

## Experiments and projects on this site

- [Tokens](https://geoffreychan.com/tokens/): Live Claude Code token usage from my smart-home agent, updated hourly.
- [Conferences](https://geoffreychan.com/conferences/): Agent-curated, high-signal software engineering conference calendar with an AI engineering bias. Filterable by region and topic.
- [Art](https://geoffreychan.com/art/): Sketchbook and personal art.
- [Comic Factory](https://geoffreychan.com/comics/): AI-generated gag comics from my scripts.

## External

- [Raven](https://raven.ai): Where I currently work as Head of Product & AI.
- [Stack Five](https://stackfive.io): Product agency I founded; clients included adidas, Reebok, Salesforce, Heroku, and Code4rena.
- [React Libraries](https://reactlibraries.com): Community-curated React libraries directory I maintain.
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/geoffchan23/)
